description: Cheerful, nimble small folk prizing good food, warm hearths, and the courage to face the unexpected.
subraces: Naturally stealthy wanderers slipping through crowds and blending into any community.
Tougher and broader than their kin, with a dwarven resilience to poison and hardship.
Reclusive forest-dwellers communicating through telepathy and distrusting outsiders.
Druidic guardians of sacred groves weaving nature magic into daily life.
Dragonmarked innkeepers whose magical touch creates comfort, warmth, and sanctuary.
Dragonmarked healers mending wounds and curing disease with a laying of hands.
